ip_outcome_note: Card name is Aether Foundation Employee; oracle text explicitly references Alolan Pokemon recovery (Supporter: recover Alolan Pokemon from discard). The depicted figures wear the canonical white-uniformed livery of the Aether Foundation from Pokemon Sun and Moon, a recognizable IP with a defined visual identity confirmed via PokemonTCG.io API and Serebii. This is an institutional/organizational IP rather than a named individual character.

trivia_bullets.text: Lost Thunder (SM8) released November 2, 2018 and was, at the time of release, the largest Pokemon TCG set ever printed — 214 cards base set, 236 including secret rares. It combined three Japanese expansions: SM7a Thunderclap Spark, SM7b Fairy Rise, and SM8 Super-Burst Impact. [PokeBeach: 'Lost Thunder To Be Largest Set in TCG History']

The Aether Foundation, headquartered on the artificial floating island Aether Paradise in Alola, publicly presents as a Pokemon conservation and rehabilitation organization. Its true purpose in Sun and Moon is to serve President Lusamine's obsession with Ultra Beasts — she weaponizes the Foundation's resources to open Ultra Wormholes and summon Nihilego. Branch Chief Faba serves as institutional enforcer. Most rank-and-file employees depicted on this card are unaware of the conspiracy. [Serebii: Aether Foundation, Villains Wiki: Aether Foundation]

The card's Supporter effect — 'Put 3 Pokemon that have Alolan in their names from your discard pile into your hand' — mechanically mirrors the Foundation's stated mission of recovering and rehabilitating Pokemon. The Alolan restriction makes this a useful recovery engine specifically in Alolan-heavy Sun and Moon era decks. [PokemonTCG.io API]

Artist credited as 'take' (all lowercase) on PokemonTCG.io — a recurring TCG illustrator known for clean human-figure trainer cards throughout the Sun and Moon series. No flavor text on this card. [PokemonTCG.io API]

related_cards.name: Lusamine
related_cards.note: Aether Foundation President; direct organizational superior to the employees depicted on this card

related_cards.name: Faba
related_cards.note: Aether Foundation Branch Chief; shares the Aether institutional identity

related_cards.name: Aether Foundation Employee
related_cards.note: Earlier print of the same institutional figure with different art

related_cards.name: Nihilego GX
related_cards.note: The Ultra Beast at the center of Lusamine's plot; organizational connection to Aether Foundation lore
